reviews.comment:
Muy buena gente. Solo quería decirles que si encuentran papeles de un camión de bs as que perdí ayer a las 6 de la tarde si son tan amables de dejarlos ahí que en cualquier momento paso a retirarlos.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice people. I just wanted to let you know that if you find any papers from a truck in Buenos Aires that I lost yesterday at 6 pm, if you would be so kind as to leave them there, I'll come by to pick them up anytime.
